action.reasoning: Observation: Latest run hit new val peak 0.7595 (best so far) with test AUC 0.7582 (extremely close to overall best 0.7583 from iter17); strong early gains then overfitting, ES at 28, local predict validation passed. ~1.5min left, training ~80s risks timeout. Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT (interaction embeds + per-skill FC + masking + clip/ES/scheduler) has converged well; test-val gap is small and likely irreducible without new ideas (e.g. SAINT/Transformer) that exceed time/iter budget. Current best_model.pt + predict.py fully compatible. Decision: No further training possible; submit current best_model.pt (strong val performer) as final entry before budget expires.
action.done_reason: Time budget nearly exhausted (1.5min left) with only 1 iter remaining; further training risks timeout/kill. Submitting strongest available checkpoint.
